name: 6.12"x8.25" Large Patina Pillar Ceramic Skull Candle Holder Black - Threshold™
description:
Add a creepy glow to your Halloween-themed table with this Large Patina Pillar Ceramic Skull Candle Holder from Threshold™. This patina candle holder features a skull with cutout eyes and a nose in a black ceramic finish. Simply add a pillar candle and place this piece on your mantel in your living room or on your entryway console or dining table for varied display options.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
